name: gemini-writing-copilot
description: Proactively route Codex prose work to Antigravity/Gemini as a local writing specialist.

interface.shortDescription: Proactively route prose work to Antigravity/Gemini.
interface.longDescription: Gemini Writing Copilot makes Codex more willing to hand off prose deliverables to Google Antigravity's local agy CLI by default, with the older Gemini Web cookie client kept as a fallback. Its skill routing is tuned for drafting, rewriting, polishing, translation, summaries, docs prose, PR descriptions, release notes, emails, announcements, blog posts, proposals, and product copy. It uses Gemini-authored composition guidance, writing-specific tasks, style profiles, voice preservation modes, output contracts, and rewrite controls for prose work while leaving coding, debugging, and architectural judgment to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Polish this paragraph in natural Korean.
Draft release notes from this change summary.
Write a PR description from these changes.
